programme.title: The Mindy Project
programme.desc: When Rob gives Mindy an opportunity to start her own practice in California, she struggles to tell Danny; Peter and Jeremy must come to terms with the fact that Lauren is moving to Texas.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Donna, an independent hotelier in the Greek islands, is preparing for her daughter's wedding with the help of two old friends. Meanwhile, Sophie, the spirited bride, has a plan. She secretly invites three men from her mother's past in hope of meeting her real father and having him escort her down the aisle on her big day.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Yours, Mine & Ours
programme.desc: When Coast Guard Adm. Frank Beardsley (Dennis Quaid) decides to move his family of eight children back to his old hometown, he encounters handbag designer Helen North (Rene Russo), an old flame from high school. Immediately, sparks fly between the two, and marriage is proposed. But Frank isn't the only one with kids to worry about -- Helen has a total of 10. Right away, the children have no intention of playing nicely, and together they decide to sabotage their parents' relationship.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Cases of Mystery Lane
programme.desc: Alden and Birdie Case find a new way to keep the mystery in their marriage alive; Alden takes classes to become a private investigator and Birdie may hold the key to solving one of his mysteries.

programme.title: Curious Caterer Mysteries
programme.desc: Goldy Berry caters a VIP concert and goes on a date with Tom.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Dead Over Diamonds
programme.desc: Professional wedding photographer Allie Adams and Detective Sam's investigation into a priceless stolen necklace leads to danger and an unexpected death.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart

programme.sub-title: Tang and a Safe Space for Everybody

programme.title: Guiding Emily
programme.desc: Emily's life changes forever after she loses her eyesight, while a guide dog struggles with training. Through a series of missed encounters, both overcome obstacles and find each other.

programme.title: Harvest Love
programme.desc: A widowed surgeon visits her family's pear orchard in hopes of taking a break from her hectic life and reconnecting with her distant son. Once there, she begins to fall for the farm manager, Will, who is growing a new hybrid pear.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love, of Course
programme.desc: A helicopter mom follows her daughter to college and lands a job on campus. When she meets a charismatic professor, she learns more about herself and discovers a life of her own.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Hope Valley faces an economic downturn together; Elizabeth and Bill learn that the children of Hope Valley have made a discovery that could change the future of the town.
